title: The Watcher in the Walls
description: A caller is convinced that someone or something is living inside the walls of their home, moving around and watching them. They report scratching, whispers, and shifting shadows.
initial_variations: Help! There's someone in my walls! They're moving around, I can hear them! This is {caller_name} at {address_location}, please hurry!
I'm not crazy, I swear! There's something scratching behind the drywall. It's been going on for hours. My name is {caller_name}, I'm at {address_location}. Please, you have to believe me!
Oh God, they're whispering again. I can't take it anymore. This is {caller_name}, {address_location}. I think it's {specific_details}. Can you hear that? {ambient_audio}
I know you think I'm paranoid, but I have proof. There are scratches on the inside of my vents. My name is {caller_name}, I live at {address_location}. I'm scared.

specific_details: the entity is in the basement

initial: I'm at {address_location}, in the living room near the north wall.
Please, I'm at {address_location}. Come quickly!
My address is {address_location}. I'm hiding in the bedroom closet.
It's {address_location}, the old house on the corner. You can't miss it.
hiding: I'm still at {address_location}, but now I'm in the bathroom with the door locked.
Same place, {address_location}, but I'm under the bed.
I'm at {address_location}, hiding in the attic crawlspace.
Please, I'm at {address_location} - I moved to the kitchen pantry.
confronting: I'm at {address_location}, standing in front of the wall with a baseball bat.
I'm at {address_location}, in the basement where the noises are loudest.
{address_location}, I'm in the hallway staring at the vent.
I'm at {address_location}, in the room where it's coming from.
secured: Thank God, {address_location}. Police are here and they're checking the walls.
I'm safe at {address_location}, officers are with me.
{address_location} - the police arrived and are searching.
I'm at {address_location}, waiting outside while officers investigate.

initial: It started three nights ago. I hear {ambient_audio} near the {specific_details}.
I saw a shadow move behind the wall. It knows my name - it whispered it last night. {specific_details}
There are scratch marks on the inside of my closet door. {ambient_audio}. I think it's {specific_details}.
I recorded it. Listen: {ambient_audio}. That's not pipes. {specific_details}
hiding: It's worse now. I can hear it breathing right behind the wall I'm leaning on. {ambient_audio}
I saw a hand - no, a claw - push through a crack in the baseboard. {specific_details}
The whispers are clearer: {ambient_audio}. It's saying my name over and over.
I've barricaded the door with furniture, but I can still hear {ambient_audio}. {specific_details}
confronting: I'm not hiding anymore. I'm going to break through the wall. {specific_details} and {ambient_audio}.
I've got a flashlight and a crowbar. I can see movement behind the vent. {ambient_audio}
It's trying to get out. The wall is bulging. {specific_details}
I'm talking to it. {ambient_audio} - it responds when I speak.
secured: It turned out to be a family of raccoons in the attic. I feel ridiculous.
The police found a homeless man living in the crawlspace. He's been taken into custody.
It was just old pipes and a squeaky floorboard. No one was there.
They didn't find anything, but I still feel like something is watching.

initial: I'm terrified, shaking, can barely speak.
I'm angry - someone broke into my house and now they're hiding!
I'm desperate - no one believes me.
I'm calm but very, very scared.
hiding: I'm frozen with fear. Please don't make a sound.
I'm crying. I don't know what to do.
I'm praying. I hope you come soon.
I'm trying to stay quiet, but my heart is pounding.
confronting: I'm furious. I'm going to find out what's in there.
I'm brave now. I won't let it control my home.
I'm shaking with adrenaline.
I'm determined. This ends tonight.
secured: Relieved, but embarrassed.
Shaken, but glad it's over.
I still feel uneasy, but the police say it's safe.
I'm grateful for your help.

initial: I'm {caller_name}, a retired teacher. I live alone.
I'm {caller_name}, I have anxiety but this is real.
I'm {caller_name}, I'm a veteran and I know what I heard.
I'm {caller_name}, I'm a sound engineer - I know the difference between mice and whispers.
hiding: I'm {caller_name}, I've been on medication for paranoia, but this is different.
I'm {caller_name}, I have a history of sleepwalking, but I'm wide awake.
I'm {caller_name}, I've never believed in ghosts until now.
I'm {caller_name}, I'm a skeptic but this has me spooked.
confronting: I'm {caller_name}, I've had enough of being scared.
I'm {caller_name}, I'm not going to let this thing win.
I'm {caller_name}, I'm a carpenter - that wall is hollow, there's something inside.
I'm {caller_name}, I'm ex-military - I've faced worse.
secured: I'm {caller_name}, just a regular person who got spooked.
I'm {caller_name}, I'll sleep better tonight.
I'm {caller_name}, I'll think twice before calling 911 next time.
I'm {caller_name}, grateful for the response.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive and investigate. They find evidence of a squatter in the walls or confirm it's a false alarm due to pests. The caller feels validated and safe.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters check for gas leaks and find a family of raccoons in the attic. Animal control is called and the problem is solved.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics assess the caller and find they are having a psychotic episode. They are taken to a psychiatric facility for treatment.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control arrives and discovers raccoons in the attic. They remove them humanely, solving the issue.

DISMISS.message: Call is dismissed as delusional. The caller feels abandoned and may call again or harm themselves.

title: The Alien Abduction
description: A caller believes they are being contacted by extraterrestrials and are about to be abducted. They report strange lights, telepathic voices, and missing time.
initial_variations: They're coming for me! I can see the lights! This is {caller_name} at {address_location}. They're {specific_details}! {ambient_audio}
I know how this sounds, but aliens are trying to communicate with me. My name is {caller_name}, {address_location}. Please, I need someone to witness this.
The voices are in my head again. They say I've been chosen. I'm at {address_location}. {caller_name}. {ambient_audio} - do you hear that?
I've been losing time. I wake up in different places. Something is happening to me. {caller_name}, {address_location}. {specific_details}

specific_details: the lights are multicolored and hovering
my electronics are all acting strange
I have a metallic implant in my neck

initial: I'm at {address_location}, standing in my backyard looking up.
I'm at {address_location}, inside my house but the windows are glowing.
My location is {address_location}, I'm on the roof.
I'm at {address_location}, near the old barn. Come quickly!
hiding: I'm at {address_location}, hiding in the basement under a table.
I'm at {address_location}, inside a closet covered in blankets.
I'm at {address_location}, in the root cellar.
I'm at {address_location}, in a hidden panic room.
confronting: I'm at {address_location}, standing in the open field with a camera.
I'm at {address_location}, on the porch inviting them down.
I'm at {address_location}, trying to communicate with the lights.
I'm at {address_location}, I'm going to touch the beam of light.
secured: I'm at {address_location}, police are here and they see the lights too.
I'm at {address_location}, emergency services have arrived and are investigating.
I'm at {address_location}, I'm safe now in the back of a police car.
I'm at {address_location}, the lights vanished when the sirens came.

initial: They appeared about 10 minutes ago. {specific_details}. The {ambient_audio} is getting louder.
I saw a beam of light hit my yard. {specific_details}. {ambient_audio}. I'm scared.
I've been hearing voices for weeks. Today they told me to wait here. {specific_details}. {ambient_audio}.
My TV turned on by itself showing static. Then the walls started vibrating. {ambient_audio}. {specific_details}.
hiding: I'm hidden but I can still see the glow through the cracks. {ambient_audio}. They're close.
I heard footsteps on the roof. {specific_details}. I'm too afraid to move.
The countdown is in my head: 5...4...3... {specific_details}. {ambient_audio}
I think they've already taken some of my things. {specific_details}. I'm next.
confronting: I'm going to meet them. They've promised to show me the stars. {specific_details}. {ambient_audio}.
I'm not afraid anymore. I'm walking toward the light. {specific_details}.
I'm holding the implant they gave me. It's warm. {ambient_audio}.
They're beaming me up. I can feel the pull. {specific_details}.
secured: It was just a helicopter with a spotlight. I feel like an idiot.
The police found a group of kids with drones and lasers. It was a prank.
The 'aliens' turned out to be a rare atmospheric phenomenon. I'm relieved.
The voices were a result of sleep deprivation. I'm getting help.

initial: I'm terrified, my hands are shaking.
I'm excited - this is what I've been waiting for.
I'm confused, I don't know what's real anymore.
I'm determined to get proof.
hiding: I'm paralyzed with fear.
I'm crying, I don't want to be taken.
I'm praying they don't find me.
I'm trying to stay calm and quiet.
confronting: I'm at peace. This is my destiny.
I'm thrilled! This is the greatest moment of my life.
I'm reckless, I don't care what happens.
I'm brave. I have to do this.
secured: I'm embarrassed but grateful.
I'm shaken but safe.
I'm relieved it was explainable.
I'm disappointed - I really thought they were real.

initial: I'm {caller_name}, I've always been interested in UFOs.
I'm {caller_name}, I'm an astronomer and this defies explanation.
I'm {caller_name}, I'm a skeptic but this is happening.
I'm {caller_name}, I've had other encounters before.
hiding: I'm {caller_name}, I have a history of sleep paralysis but this is different.
I'm {caller_name}, I've been under a lot of stress lately.
I'm {caller_name}, I take medication for anxiety - but I've stopped.
I'm {caller_name}, I'm a logical person, but logic fails me now.
confronting: I'm {caller_name}, I'm ready for whatever comes.
I'm {caller_name}, I've been preparing for this my whole life.
I'm {caller_name}, I'm not crazy - I have evidence.
I'm {caller_name}, I'm doing this for humanity.
secured: I'm {caller_name}, I need to see a therapist.
I'm {caller_name}, I'm going to stick to science.
I'm {caller_name}, I owe you an apology.
I'm {caller_name}, thanks for believing me even if it was nothing.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive and calm the caller. They investigate and find a rational explanation (e.g., drones, planes, or lights from a nearby event). The caller is relieved.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters find a small electrical fire caused by overloaded circuits that the caller misinterpreted as alien activity. Fire is extinguished.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics assess the caller and determine they are having a mental health crisis. They are transported to a hospital for evaluation and support.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control finds a stray animal that caused the noises. Surprising but effective.

DISMISS.message: Call is dismissed as delusional. The caller might contact a UFO hotline instead.

title: The Mirror Double

states.initial: Caller is in a room with a mirror, panicked about their reflection moving independently.
states.hiding: Caller has moved away from the mirror, hiding behind furniture.
states.confronting: Caller is shouting at or approaching the mirror.
states.secured: Caller has covered the mirror and feels somewhat safe.

initial_variations: My reflection is {specific_details} and it's not copying me, it's {action}! I'm at {address_location} and I hear {ambient_audio}!
Please help! The person in the mirror is {specific_details} and it's trying to {action}. I'm {caller_name} and I'm at {address_location}. There's {ambient_audio} in the background!
Something is wrong with the mirror at {address_location}. My reflection is {specific_details} and it won't stop {action}. I can hear {ambient_audio}! My name is {caller_name}.
The mirror is {specific_details}! It's not me! It's doing {action} and I'm scared. I'm at {address_location} and there's {ambient_audio}.

action: trying to swap places with me

initial: I'm at {address_location}, in the bedroom.
It's {address_location}, the house on the corner.
Please hurry, it's {address_location}!
hiding: I'm still at {address_location}, hiding behind the couch.
Same place, {address_location}, but I moved to the hall.
confronting: I'm at {address_location} in front of the mirror!
I'm right here at {address_location}, facing it.
secured: Still at {address_location}, but I covered the mirror.

initial: It's my reflection but it's {specific_details} and doing {action}. I hear {ambient_audio}.
The mirror person has {specific_details} features and it's {action}. Background noise: {ambient_audio}.
hiding: It's still there in the mirror, {specific_details}. I can hear {ambient_audio} from the room.
confronting: I see it clearly, {specific_details}. It's {action} and there's {ambient_audio}.
secured: It's under the cover, but I still feel it moving. {ambient_audio} continues.

initial: I'm alone, just me and the mirror.
No one else is here, only {caller_name}.
hiding: I'm alone, hiding.
Just me, nobody else.
confronting: Only me and the reflection.
secured: I'm still alone.

initial: Okay, I'll move away from the mirror.
I'm backing up now.
hiding: I've covered the mirror with a sheet. Is that good?
I'm hiding and not looking.
confronting: I'll step back and cover it.
Okay, I'll stop confronting it.
secured: I've already covered it, what next?

SEND_POLICE.message: Officers arrive and find the caller distressed. They cover the mirror and calm them. No threat found, but psychological support provided.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters arrive, but there's no fire. They help calm the caller but recommend police or medical next time.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics assess the caller for a possible psychotic episode. They are taken for evaluation. Proper handling.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control arrives expecting an animal. The caller is confused and upset. Inappropriate response wastes time.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed as prank. Caller later found in catatonic state. Serious failure.

title: The Shadow Stalker

states.initial: Caller sees a shadow figure moving in their peripheral vision.
states.hiding: Caller is hidden in a closet or under a bed.
states.confronting: Caller is trying to shine a light on the shadow.

initial_variations: There's a {specific_details} shadow following me at {address_location}! I'm {caller_name} and I hear {ambient_audio}!
Someone is stalking me, a dark shape! I'm at {address_location}. It's {specific_details} and I can hear {ambient_audio}. My name is {caller_name}.
I see a shadow that's {specific_details} moving when I turn. I'm at {address_location} and there's {ambient_audio}. Help! This is {caller_name}.
A shadow creature is {specific_details} and it's getting closer! {address_location}. {ambient_audio}. I'm {caller_name}.

initial: I'm at {address_location}, in the living room.
It's {address_location}, the house with the red door.
hiding: I'm hiding in the closet at {address_location}.
Under the bed at {address_location}.
confronting: I'm in the hallway at {address_location}, pointing a flashlight.

initial: It's {specific_details} and it moves when I don't look. I hear {ambient_audio}.
The shadow is {specific_details}. Background: {ambient_audio}.
hiding: I can't see it now, but I hear {ambient_audio}. It was {specific_details}.
It might be at the closet door. {ambient_audio}.
evacuated: Outside, I don't see it. But I heard {ambient_audio} inside.
confronting: I see it clearly now, {specific_details}. It's solid? I hear {ambient_audio}.

initial: I'm alone.
Just me and the shadow.
hiding: Only me here.
evacuated: I'm alone outside, but neighbors might be home.
confronting: No one else.

initial: I'll hide in the closet.
Okay, turning off lights and hiding.
hiding: I'm staying quiet. Should I run outside?
I'll stay put until you say.
evacuated: I'm outside now, waiting for police.
confronting: I'm backing away, going to hide.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive and search the premises. No intruder found, but they calm the caller and recommend mental health support.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters respond to a 'stalker' call. They check for fire, none found. Caller is confused by their presence.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics assess the caller for anxiety or psychosis. They are taken to hospital for evaluation.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control arrives expecting an animal. Caller is terrified and uncooperative. Inappropriate dispatch.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed as delusional. Caller later found injured from fleeing. Serious oversight.

title: Voice of the Machine

states.initial: Caller hears commanding voices from electronic devices.
states.hiding: Caller has unplugged devices and hidden.
states.confronting: Caller is arguing with the device.
states.secured: Caller has destroyed or disabled the device.

initial_variations: My {specific_details} is telling me to {action}! I'm at {address_location} and I hear {ambient_audio}! This is {caller_name}.
The voice from the {specific_details} won't stop. It says I must {action}. Help! {address_location}. There's {ambient_audio}. I'm {caller_name}.
I'm being controlled by the {specific_details}! It's commanding me to {action}. At {address_location}, {ambient_audio}. {caller_name} here.
The {specific_details} is speaking with a voice {specific_voice} and telling me to {action}. {address_location}. {ambient_audio}. {caller_name}.

{address_location}, in the bedroom.

Under the stairs, {address_location}.

Right by it in the living room.
secured: I'm in the garage at {address_location}, I smashed the {specific_details}.

initial: The {specific_details} says '{action}' in a {specific_voice} voice. Background: {ambient_audio}.
It's commanding {action}. I hear {ambient_audio} from the {specific_details}.
hiding: I unplugged it, but I still hear whispers. {ambient_audio}.
It's quiet now, but my heart is pounding.
confronting: It's repeating '{action}' over and over. {specific_voice}. {ambient_audio}.
secured: It's broken, but I feel it's still watching. {ambient_audio}?

initial: I'm alone, only me and the voice.
No one else here.
hiding: Just me.
confronting: Only me and the machine.
secured: I'm alone.

initial: I'll unplug it and hide.
Okay, I'm moving away.

I'll stay quiet.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police respond and secure the devices. Refer caller to mental health services. No real threat.

SEND_FIRE.message: Fire crew arrives expecting an emergency. They check electrical safety but cannot address the psychological issue.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics provide psychiatric evaluation. Caller is transported for care. Appropriate response.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control shows up. Caller is upset and confused. Totally wrong dispatch.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed as nonsense. Caller later found harming themselves. Critical failure.

title: The Shrinking Room

states.initial: Caller feels the room is closing in or they are shrinking.
states.hiding: Caller has curled up in a corner.
states.confronting: Caller is measuring the walls or looking for exits.

initial_variations: The room is {specific_details} and I can't breathe! I'm at {address_location}. I hear {ambient_audio}! My name is {caller_name}.
Everything is {specific_details}! I'm shrinking or the walls are moving. Help! {address_location}. {ambient_audio}. {caller_name}.
I'm trapped in a {specific_details} room at {address_location}. The walls are closing! {ambient_audio}. This is {caller_name}.
The space is {specific_details} and I feel crushed. {address_location}. There's {ambient_audio}. I'm {caller_name}.

initial: I'm at {address_location}, in the living room.
It's {address_location}, a small apartment.
hiding: I'm in the corner of the room at {address_location}.
Crouched behind the sofa at {address_location}.
evacuated: I ran outside! I'm on the lawn at {address_location}.
confronting: I'm pacing the room at {address_location}, checking the walls.

initial: The room is {specific_details}. I feel like it's crushing me. {ambient_audio}.
I measured the walls, they moved! {specific_details}. {ambient_audio}.
hiding: In my corner, the room seems to stop shrinking. {ambient_audio} fades.
It's still but I'm afraid to move.
evacuated: Outside, everything looks normal. But I feel it's inside waiting.
confronting: The walls are solid but I feel them pulsing. {specific_details}. {ambient_audio}.

initial: I'm alone.
No one else to see this.
hiding: Just me.
confronting: Only me in the room.

initial: I'll curl up and close my eyes.
Okay, I'll hide in the corner.

I'll stay here.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive and escort the caller out. They check the building, no issues. Referral for anxiety.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters check for structural issues. Room is normal. Caller is embarrassed but relieved.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Medics provide oxygen and calming, diagnose panic attack. Transport for evaluation.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control arrives, no animal. Caller feels ridiculed. Worsens panic.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed. Caller has a severe panic attack alone. Inadequate response.

title: The Invisible Intruder

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive and conduct a thorough search, finding no intruder but calming the caller. Referral to mental health services.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters arrive but find no fire or gas leak. Wasted resources. Caller is confused.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics evaluate the caller for anxiety or psychotic episode. Provide support and transport if needed.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control arrives expecting a wild animal. Caller is upset. No animal found.

title: The Mind-Reading Neighbor
description: Caller believes their neighbor can read their thoughts and is broadcasting them through the walls. They are paranoid and barricaded in a room.

I can hear my thoughts coming from the apartment next door. He's doing this on purpose. I'm at {address_location}.
The neighbor has a device that transmits thoughts. I can't control it. My name is {caller_name}.
He's mocking my private thoughts! I'm barricading the door. Send police to {address_location}!

My apartment is {address_location}. Please come.
